description: Customize the local Jitsi Meet deployment to meet corporate requirements. Apply the following settings to the configuration override file at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js: config.defaultLanguage = 'fr', config.requireDisplayName = true, config.startWithAudioMuted = true, config.startWithVideoMuted = true, config.prejoinConfig = { enabled: true, hideDisplayName: false }, config.disableDeepLinking = true, config.disableThirdPartyRequests = true, and config.enableWelcomePage = true. Ensure the changes are active at http://localhost:8080. Save a screenshot of the French home page to ~/jitsi_config_verification.png and save the served configuration from http://localhost:8080/custom-config.js to ~/custom_config_served.txt.
